name: Schweiter Technologies AG
summary: Schweiter Technologies AG engages in the development, production, and distribution of cast plastic sheets, composite panels, foam boards, and core materials for composite structures in Europe, the Americas, Asia, and internationally. It provides materials for sandwich constructions, principally for use in wind farms; and composite panels for facades and display applications in the display, architecture, wind energy, marine, transportation, and industrial markets. The company offers its products under the ALUCOBOND, AIREX, BALTEK, CRYLON, CRYLUX, DIBOND, FOREX, GATOR, KAPA, SINTRA, SMART-X, and PERSPEX brands. In addition, it is involved in the property management activities; and provision of management services. The company was founded in 1912 and is headquartered in Steinhausen, Switzerland.
